---
title: "Overview of learning objectives"
format: html
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false


from pathlib import Path
import re
import yaml

slides_dir = Path("slides")
results = []

def extract_yaml_and_body(text):
    """Split YAML front matter and body."""
    if text.startswith("---"):
        parts = text.split("---", 2)
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return parts[1], parts[2]
    return "", text

def extract_learning_objectives(body):
    """Extract ::: {.learning-objectives} blocks."""
    pattern = re.compile(
        r":::\s*\{\.learning-objectives.*?\}(.*?):::",
        re.DOTALL
    )
    matches = pattern.findall(body)
    objectives = []

    for match in matches:
        lines = match.strip().splitlines()
        for line in lines:
            line = line.strip()
            if line.startswith("- "):
                objectives.append(line[2:].strip())

    return objectives

def extract_session_number(meta):
    """Extract numeric session value (e.g., 'Session 3' -> 3)."""
    session = meta.get("session", "")
    match = re.search(r"\d+", str(session))
    return int(match.group()) if match else 999  # fallback for missing sessions

for qmd in slides_dir.rglob("*.qmd"):
    text = qmd.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    yaml_text, body = extract_yaml_and_body(text)

    title = qmd.stem  # fallback
    meta = {}
    session_number = 999

    if yaml_text:
        try:
            meta = yaml.safe_load(yaml_text)
            title = meta.get("subtitle") or meta.get("title") or title
            session_number = extract_session_number(meta)
        except Exception:
            pass

    objectives = extract_learning_objectives(body)

    if objectives:
        results.append({
            "file": qmd,
            "title": str(title),
            "objectives": objectives,
            "session_number": session_number
        })

# Sort by session number (numeric)
results.sort(key=lambda x: x["session_number"])

for entry in results:
    print(f"## {entry['title']}\n")
    for obj in entry["objectives"]:
        print(f"- {obj}")
    print()


```
